---
title: "Introduction to R for Data Analysis"
---

[Dr Tom Saunders](https://profiles.auckland.ac.nz/tom-saunders)\
Centre for eResearch\  
University of Auckland

Dr Murray Cadzow\
University of Otago

Welcome to *Introduction to R for Data Analysis*, a 2 hour workshop designed to introduce the R programming language to researchers who have no programming experience.

# Set Up

Follow the instructions on the [set up](setup.html) page before the workshop.

We recommend using two monitors for the workshop to allow you to follow along while coding.

# Learning Objectives

The primary objective of this workshop is to introduce attendees to the R programming language. By the end of the workshop you will be able to:

- Create basic plots to visualise data in tables/spreadsheets.
- Explore datasets using vectors, data frames, and functions.
- Import, manipulate, and export datasets and figures.
